product_overview: Telegram Mini App front-end for the Lila Chakra self-discovery game that records played games, shows AI interpretations and player insights, and lets users review and edit game diary entries. Built with Vue 3 + Quasar and intended to run inside Telegram or in local dev mode.
core_goals: Allow authenticated users to play Lila games and record every move in a persistent diary.
Provide a detailed game diary view with timeline, AI interpretations, clarifications and editable player insights.
Support developers with local dev mode while enforcing Telegram environment and authentication in production.
Make key game actions (create game, play moves, review diary) discoverable and robust with clear error handling and retry paths.

features.name: User Authentication (Login)
features.description: Users authenticate to access protected routes and persisted game data. Development mode supports local testing while production requires valid Telegram init data.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill email field -> Fill password field -> Click Login button -> See redirect to /diary
Navigate to /game when unauthenticated -> Router redirects to /login -> See login page
Navigate to /login -> Fill email field -> Fill incorrect password -> Click Login button -> See authentication error message

features.name: Game Diary List
features.description: Displays a list of played games for the authenticated user and provides entry points to each game's detailed diary.
user_flows: Navigate to /diary -> App requests list of games -> See list of games displayed -> Click a game item -> Navigate to /diary/:id
Navigate to /diary while not authenticated -> Router redirects to /login -> See login page
Navigate to /diary -> App requests list of games -> API returns error -> See error banner with retry option -> Click Retry -> App requests list of games again

features.name: Game Diary Details
features.description: View full details for a played game: move timeline, aggregated AI interpretations, clarification questions (accordion), and editable player insights per move.
user_flows: Navigate to /diary/:id -> App requests GET /api/v1/games/{game_id}/diary -> View game timeline and aggregated data -> See list of moves and AI interpretations
Navigate to /diary/:id -> View move list -> Click Sort button -> Toggle sort order (oldest/newest) -> See moves reordered
Navigate to /diary/:id -> View clarification list -> Click a clarification accordion header -> Expand clarification questions to see answers

Navigate to /diary/:id -> Locate a move -> Click Edit insight on a move -> Fill insight input -> Click Save insight -> App posts POST /api/v1/games/{game_id}/moves/{move_id}/insight -> See updated insight saved inline

Navigate to /diary/:id -> App requests GET /api/v1/games/{game_id}/diary -> API returns 500 error -> See error banner with 'Retry' button -> Click Retry -> App requests GET /api/v1/games/{game_id}/diary again
Navigate to /diary/:id -> Click Edit insight on a move -> Leave insight empty -> Click Save insight -> See client validation error prompting required input

Navigate to /diary/:id -> Click Edit insight on a move -> Fill insight input -> Click Save insight -> POST /api/v1/games/{game_id}/moves/{move_id}/insight fails -> See save error message and Retry option

features.name: Create New Game
features.description: Start a new Lila game by providing required settings and initializing the game board.
user_flows: Navigate to /game/new -> Fill required game fields -> Click Create button -> See redirect to /game and new game loaded
Navigate to /game/new -> Leave required field blank -> Click Create button -> See validation error for missing field
Navigate to /game/new -> Fill fields -> Click Create button -> API returns error -> See error notification with Retry option

features.name: Play Game (Game Board)
features.description: Main interactive game board where users make moves, observe results, and finalize games which then appear in the diary.
user_flows: Navigate to /game -> See current board and controls -> Perform a move (e.g., roll dice) -> Move added to game state -> See move reflected on board and move list
Navigate to /game -> Make moves until game completes -> See completion state and option to view diary -> Click View Diary -> Navigate to /diary/:id
Navigate to /game -> Attempt an action that requires network save -> Network request fails -> See transient error toast with Retry option -> Click Retry -> Action is retried

routes.description: Detailed game diary with timeline, clarifications and insights

features.name: Game Diary Details
features.description: View game details, moves, ai interpretations, clarification questions (accordion), and player insights
user_interactions: View game timeline and aggregated data
Expand clarification questions to see answers
Edit player insight for a move
Navigate to meditation or report if game is completed
